title:
Тихий убийца vs. Естественное восстановление: как работает тело
 

Мы часто думаем, что для здоровья нужны тяжёлые кардионагрузки. Но простая разница между растяжкой и сидением способна полностью переписать вашу биологию. Визуальное сравнение выше наглядно показывает резкий контраст между малоподвижным, зажатым телом и телом, которое ежедневно двигается и восстанавливается.

⸻

🛑 МЕТАБОЛИЧЕСКИЙ СТОП (сидение)

Если вы сидите больше 30 минут подряд, ваш метаболизм фактически «засыпает».

О
prompt_text: A split-screen digital medical illustration comparing diet and anatomy. On the left, a person sits eating a burger and fries; on the right, another person eats a salad. Both are rendered with transparent glass-like skin, revealing skeletons, organs, and yellow adipose tissue. The lighting is studio-style against a neutral gray background. As the video progresses, the yellow fat deposits shift and transform between the two figures to represent weight gain and loss.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A split-screen digital medical illustration comparing diet and anatomy. On the left, a person sits eating a burger and fries; on the right, another person eats a salad. Both are rendered with transparent glass-like skin, revealing skeletons, organs, and yellow adipose tissue. The lighting is studio-style against a neutral gray background. As the video progresses, the yellow fat deposits shift and transform between the two figures to represent weight gain and loss.

cinematography.cameraShot: Static full-body medium shot, split-screen composition.

actions: The figure on the left eats a burger while yellow fat globules fill their abdomen and thighs.
The figure on the right eats a salad, and their existing body fat visibly drains away.
The left figure transforms from thin to obese as they continue eating junk food.
The right figure transforms from obese to fit and muscular while eating greens.
The skeleton and internal organs remain visible throughout the transformation.
dialogue: [Whirring and squelching sound effect during the fat transformation]
